description_long: This is a large, L-shaped wooden desk with a light woodgrain top and darker wood sides and drawer unit. The desk features a prominent angular cutout, providing an ergonomic workspace and additional surface area. On the right side, there is a set of two drawers, one of which is open, revealing a spacious storage compartment. The handles on the drawers are rectangular and metallic, contrasting with the wood finish. The desk's construction appears sturdy, with thick panels and a solid base, making it suitable for heavy use. The overall design is modern and functional, ideal for professional or home office environments.
description: A large, L-shaped wooden desk with a light woodgrain top, dark wood sides, and two metallic-handled drawers on the right.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the L-shape, light wood top, and two drawers on the right, with one drawer open.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the open drawer extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid dark wood back panel and the angular cutout of the desktop.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite end, showing the continuous woodgrain top and the desk's overall width.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the drawers and the angular cutout, designed for ergonomic access and storage.
